name: fogbugz-mcp
description: Interact with FogBugz issue tracking via LLMs — create, search, update, assign, resolve, and close cases.

fogbugzUrl.title: FogBugz URL
fogbugzUrl.description: Base URL of your FogBugz instance (e.g. https://yourcompany.fogbugz.com).

fogbugzApiKey.title: FogBugz API Key
fogbugzApiKey.description: Your personal FogBugz API token. Found under My Settings → API Tokens.
